# Ops Registry: test_fondu
# Auto-generated by fondu --install
# Format: op_name|description|args_format

increment_counter|Increment counter by 1|project_path:string
decrement_counter|Decrement counter by 1|project_path:string
reset_counter|Reset counter to 0|project_path:string
